title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.390 - Circuit court to examine title
text:
49.390.  Circuit court to examine title. — Such court shall examine its title and certify its decision thereon to the county commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 13721, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12062; 1919 § 9462; 1909 § 3683 
Effective 1-01-85
